name: Python grouped UMAP scatter
description: Plot precomputed embedding coordinates with Matplotlib and return Figure/Axes without implicit saving.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: One row per observation with precomputed coordinates.

parameters.name: legend_fontsize
parameters.description: Legend label size in points for publication-scale output.

parameters.name: legend_title_fontsize
parameters.description: Legend title size in points for publication-scale output.

supports_claims: Shows local embedding neighborhoods and displayed category distribution.
does_not_support: Does not establish abundance differences, significance, trajectory, global distances, or causality.
safer_alternatives: sample-level proportion plot for abundance claims

visual_fingerprint.final_size_behavior: requires point, label and legend check
visual_fingerprint.review_note: The current base plus label-repel and borderless modifiers was rendered twice from umap_points.csv, including a fresh 85 x 75 mm layout, and both artifacts were opened natively on 2026-07-17. Points, displaced labels, leader lines and the outside legend remain readable and unclipped; the figure supports embedding-neighbourhood description only, not abundance, significance, trajectory or causality.

notes: The source block incorrectly fenced as R was recognized as Python and corrected.
Final-size composition is rebuilt before label/layout modifiers so QA evaluates the delivered geometry.
Exact materialized code, normalized parameters, fixture data and both images are retained as live hash-bound files.
Exact fixture render passed native original-size and 85 x 75 mm visual review; tier remains parse-verified pending a separate formal promotion audit.
